item.title: My First Post
item.description:
Introduction

Hello reader! This is my first post on my website. Maybe this is the only one or maybe you scrolled all the way down to find this post. Either way, I hope you enjoy your stay on my website.

What is this website about?

I made this website today after a friend of mine shared this cool website with me: Usecue When I saw how insanely fast this page loaded I was instantly sold. I already had my own website but it was slow and I didn’t like the design. So I decided to make a new website with Hugo.

About me

Who am I?

I am a student currently studying Information & Communication Technology at the HU University of Applied Sciences Utrecht in The Netherlands. I like the internet and everything about it.

Interests

My interests are mainly in the backend operations of applications. I like to see how programs work behind the scenes. I also love to learn new things.
